parents.subject: LU-17194 osc: get srvlock from otp

commit.subject: LU-17194 osc: remove ci_ndelay usage
commit.message:
LU-17194 osc: remove ci_ndelay usage

This is part of removing cl_io usage in the DIO submission
path.  Replace with cdp_ndelay.

Test-Parameters: forjanitoronly
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ib58702586bb89839a2c454b05d6cca54e6c3daf3
